name: Black Walnut Cookies
recipeIngredient: Dry sugar substitute equal to 1/4 cup Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream margarine, sugar and dry sugar substitute together at medium speed until lightly and creamy.
2. Add egg whites, black walnut flavoring, water, and mix at medium speed for 30 seconds, scraping down the bowl before and after adding each ingredient.
3. Stir flour, nuts, dry buttermilk, baking soda, and salt together to blend well, and add to the creamy mixture. Mix at medium speed to blend.
4. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoons onto cookie sheets sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
5. Press each cookie down to 1/2 inch thick with the back of a tablespoon dipped in cold water.
6. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 14 minutes, or until cookies are browned on the bottom.
7. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack.
